title: Gecode Musical Constraint Solver Config
description: JSON configuration for the Gecode Musical Constraint Solver. Export keys (export_json, export_txt, export_xml, export_path) must appear before the rules key.

name.description: Human-readable name. Used as the base filename for exported results.

description.description: Optional description of what this configuration does.

solution_length.description: Number of event slots (notes/rests) per voice.

score_length.description: Optional total score length in quarter-note units, e.g. '8q' or '12q'.

global_domain.description: Shared fallback pitch and/or rhythm domain for all voices. Any voice not listed in 'voices' (or that omits a component) falls back to this.

voices.description: Per-voice pitch and rhythm domain definitions. Array index determines voice index unless the entry has an explicit 'voice' key. Can be omitted or shorter than num_voices when global_domain covers remaining voices.

meter.description: Optional metric domain. Required when using r-time-signature or r-metric-hierarchy rules.

tuplets.description: Subdivision factors that require tuplet notation (e.g. [3] for triplets). The internal tick grid is extended automatically.

beat_divisions.description: All subdivision factors per beat, including native and tuplet ones.

branching.description: 'first_fail' picks the variable with the smallest domain (recommended). 'input_order' uses declaration order.

value_order.description: 'min' = shortest absolute duration / lowest pitch. 'random' = random order. 'heuristic' = scored by heuristic_energy rules.

max_solutions.description: Maximum solutions to find. 0 or 'all' = unlimited. Default 1.

random_seed.description: 0 = fresh random seed per run. N > 0 = fixed reproducible seed. Omit for fully deterministic (no randomness).

heuristic_top_k.description: Only evaluate top K candidates for heuristic scoring. 0 = all candidates.

heuristic_trace.description: Print heuristic scores during search for debugging.

enable_metric_engine.description: Enable the metric/time-signature engine. Auto-enabled when meter rules are present.

require_exact_score_length.description: Require the solution to exactly fill the score_length.

export_json.description: Save raw solution as JSON. Default true. MUST appear before 'rules' in the file.

export_txt.description: Save human-readable text summary. Default true. MUST appear before 'rules' in the file.

export_xml.description: Save as MusicXML. Default false. MUST appear before 'rules' in the file.

export_path.description: Output directory for all exported files. Default 'tests/output'. MUST appear before 'rules' in the file.

rules.description: Built-in constraint rules. Export keys must appear before this key in the JSON file.

voice.description: Explicit voice index. When omitted the array position determines the index.

rule_type.description: Rule type identifier. r-pitches-one-engine is a legacy alias for r-one-voice with target_component:pitch.

constraint_function.description: Verbose form. Use 'constraint' shorthand in new configs.

parameters.description: Constraint-specific parameters: rhythm values, semitone counts, ratios, time signatures.

target_voices.description: Voice indices this rule applies to, e.g. [0] or [0, 1].

target_component.description: Component to constrain. Omit for r-rhythm-rhythm and r-pitch-pitch (auto-targeted).

indices.description: Explicit position list. Omit to apply at all positions.

stride.description: Apply rule every N positions starting from 'offset'. Takes precedence over 'indices'.

offset.description: Starting position for stride-based application. Default 0.

heuristic.description: r-pitch-pitch / r-rhythm-rhythm only. When true, converts the rule to a soft preference: values satisfying the rule are tried first but violations are not rejected. Default false (hard constraint).

timepoints.description: Quarter-note positions for metric timeline, e.g. ['0q', '4q', '7q'].

bar_pattern_type.description: For r-time-signature: how to expand bar_pattern.

bar_pattern.description: List of time signatures for bar-oriented metric rules.

bar_pattern_count.description: Number of bars to generate for 'random' or 'weighted' mode.

bar_pattern_repetitions.description: Explicit repetition count for 'repeating' mode. 0 = fill score automatically.

bar_pattern_distribution.description: Probability weights for 'weighted' mode. Keys are time signatures, values are probabilities (should sum to ~1.0).

allow_cross_barline.description: For r-time-signature bar patterns: allow note durations to cross barlines.

pattern_offsets.description: Window offsets for wildcard expansion, e.g. [0, 1].

enabled.description: Enable or disable this rule. Default true.

expression.description: Expression using voice[N].pitch[i], voice[N].rhythm[i], ?current, abs(), max(), min(), in, not_in.

weight.description: Relative importance of this heuristic. Default 1.

priority.description: Scoring bucket — higher evaluated first in tie-breaking.

candidate_voice.description: Restrict heuristic evaluation to this specific voice.
